contract_role: source-owned per-lens review intent and UI/MCP consumption hints

views.review_intent: Review formation, fixation, canonization, preservation, and dating pressure without treating dates as settled verdicts.
views.source_posture: Every visible row, dossier, cluster, and relation must route back to atlas rows or view contracts.
views.evidence_posture: Surface confidence, status, dossier coverage, and dating uncertainty before concept synthesis.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring chronology counts, weak source refs, unresolved era/tradition clusters, and top regional clusters.

views.review_intent: Review movement through language, script, school, archive, translation, copying, commentary, and reception corridors.
views.source_posture: Movement must stay tied to source documents, dossier rows, or later explicit transmission nodes.
views.evidence_posture: Do not infer influence from movement alone; mark missing relation evidence as unresolved.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring transmission clusters, relation-kind pressure, and any dense hubs that look like unreviewed influence claims.

views.review_intent: Review source witnesses, preservation posture, controversy, and proof limits before downstream synthesis.
views.source_posture: Source refs are first-class; research packets remain preparation, not source witnesses.
views.evidence_posture: Prioritize confidence, status, dossier availability, and missing source refs.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring weak-source rows, unresolved evidence clusters, and source documents with sparse coverage.

views.review_intent: Review concept, problem, method, genre, contrast, analogy, and lineage pressure without flattening languages or institutions.
views.source_posture: Concept clusters must preserve the row or future concept-node source that produced them.
views.evidence_posture: Separate candidate conceptual pressure from canonical relation packs.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring concept/problem clusters, candidate pressure, and any conceptual hubs that need human review.

views.review_intent: Review schools, temples, courts, libraries, archives, media, scripts, and institutions as load-bearing conditions.
views.source_posture: Infrastructure claims must stay anchored to source documents or later institution/media nodes.
views.evidence_posture: Mark institution and medium pressure as candidate until branch nodes or source witnesses mature.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring institution/media clusters and distinguish infrastructure pressure from canon.

views.review_intent: Review scripts, sign systems, artifacts, partial readings, decipherment, and uncertainty posture.
views.source_posture: Frontier scripts and decipherment claims must never outrun source refs and uncertainty markers.
views.evidence_posture: Prioritize confidence, controversy, preservation, and unresolved script evidence.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring unresolved decipherment pressure and low-confidence source clusters.

views.review_intent: Review parallel versions, administrative languages, translation regimes, and empire-scale writing systems.
views.source_posture: Version and language claims must preserve source hierarchy and audience differences.
views.evidence_posture: Do not make parallel versions equal in authority without source evidence.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring language/script clusters and unresolved multilingual source posture.

views.review_intent: Review treaty, oath, law, decree, ritual, legitimacy, and state action as philosophical infrastructure.
views.source_posture: Ritual and law claims must remain tied to rows, inscriptions, dossiers, or later source witnesses.
views.evidence_posture: Separate law/ritual thinking-in-action from generic religion or modern legal categories.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring law/ritual clusters and candidate-to-canon pressure.

views.review_intent: Review inscriptions, cities, carriers, alphabetic handoffs, public writing, and distributed epigraphic networks.
views.source_posture: Network claims must remain non-teleological and source-ref anchored.
views.evidence_posture: Mark missing carriers, cities, and inscription evidence as unresolved rather than filling the graph.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring public-writing clusters and unresolved carrier/source gaps.

views.review_intent: Review lost, fragmentary, indirectly attested, or mediated corpora without inventing absent content.
views.source_posture: Absence and mediation are visible facts; indirect witnesses must remain explicit.
views.evidence_posture: Prioritize lost-corpus gaps, indirect evidence, low confidence, and missing dossier coverage.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring absence-evidence clusters and weak source routes.

views.review_intent: Review movement from research scaffold through candidate pressure toward canon and derived exports.
views.source_posture: Promotion pressure must not become canon unless reviewed in the canon route.
views.evidence_posture: Separate candidate, reviewed, canonical, and generated export status.
views.agent_packet_hint: Bring candidate-to-canon pressure, unresolved clusters, and human review route.
